tool_schema.description: Switch the current agent's persona to an ECC (Everything Claude Code) specialized persona. ECC personas provide specialized behavioral instincts and knowledge for tasks like code review, security analysis, architectural planning, and performance optimization. Switching a persona updates the agent's internal identity and behavior guidelines.

parameter.name: persona_name
parameter.description: The name of the ECC persona to load. Example: 'code-reviewer', 'security-reviewer', 'architect', 'planner', 'tdd-guide'.
